AppleCare+ for iPad Pro 13-inch (M5) (2 years)
from Amazon.com Services LLC
4.5 4835
  • DROPPED, CRACKED, FIXED—Get easy, fast repairs for accidents like drops and spills as often as you need.
  • 24/7 PRIORITY SUPPORT—Connect with an Apple expert any time to get help with the products you love.
  • BATTERY REPLACEMENTS—If your battery holds less than 80% capacity, get a new battery at no extra charge.
  • EXPRESS REPLACEMENT SERVICE—We’ll ship you a replacement before you send your original device in.
  • REPLACEMENTS FOR ACCESSORIES—Damaged iPad accessories like Apple Pencil or an Apple-branded keyboard can be replaced for a small fee.
  • GLOBAL REPAIR ACCESS—Help is never far away. Visit an Apple Store or one of our 5000+ Apple Authorized Service Providers worldwide.
  • EXTENDED COVERAGE, BUILT IN—Get extended warranty coverage for any hardware issues.

Support
Product support included
What's Product Support?
In the event your product doesn't work as expected or you need help using it, Amazon offers free product support options such as live phone/chat with an Amazon associate, manufacturer contact information, step-by-step troubleshooting guides, and help videos. By solving product issues, we help the planet by extending the life of products. Availability of support options differ by product and country. Learn more

Payment
Secure transaction
Your transaction is secure
We work hard to protect your security and privacy. Our payment security system encrypts your information during transmission. We don’t share your credit card details with third-party sellers, and we don’t sell your information to others. Learn more

Amazon's Choice
1 sustainability feature

Sustainability features

This product has sustainability features recognized by trusted certifications.
Energy efficiency
Conserves energy compared to similar products.
As certified by
EPEAT

EPEAT

EPEAT certifies electronic products based on sustainability impacts across their life cycle including requirements for energy efficiency and end-of-life management. An EPEAT registered product can also meet optional more ambitious criteria including reduction of fluorinated greenhouse gases (F-GHGs). Products meeting 50% - 74% optional criteria are 'Silver' and those meeting 75% or more are 'Gold'.

Learn more about this certification

Certification Level

GOLD

Discover more products with sustainability features. Learn more

Back
Prime Visa
(ending with 8129)
When a cart qualifies for multiple financing options, the longest term option will be applied by default at checkout.
The monthly payment amount ($99.92/mo) is estimated and may change when shipping and tax is applied. No interest will be charged for this financing offer. Any balance remaining after the promotional period ends will accrue interest at your standard Purchase APR.
When your order ships, the entire purchase amount will be charged to your card and deducted from your available credit. Check your statement for the amount due each month.
See terms and conditions
Back
Affirm
(approval required. No late fees.)
Enter a few pieces of information for a real-time decision. This check doesn't affect your credit score.
Plans range from 3 to 48 months. Your first payment may be due today.
Make your payment at affirm.com or in the Affirm app. You'll get reminders when a payment is coming up.
Your rate will be 10-36% APR based on credit. 0% APR options may be available on specific items and/or during limited time promotions. For example, a $300 purchase could be split into 12 monthly payments of $27.79 at 20% APR. Options depend on your purchase, and a down payment may be required, which will not exceed 50% of the total purchase amount (including taxes, shipping, or any add-on charges). Payment options through Affirm are subject to an eligibility check, may not be available everywhere, and are provided by these lending partners: affirm.com/lenders. For licenses and disclosures, including information for New Mexico residents, see affirm.com/licenses. CA residents: Loans by Affirm Loan Services, LLC are made or arranged pursuant to a California Finance Lender license
Learn more
Back
Prime Store Card
(receive instant gift card on approval)
Pay equal monthly payments on Amazon.com purchases, at 0% APR, over the financing offer period*.
6 equal monthly payments on purchases between $50 and $599.99
12 equal monthly payments on purchases of $600 or more
24 equal monthly payments on select purchases
*Offer subject to credit approval and can be selected at checkout on qualifying purchases. Available using all Store Card accounts and Secured Card accounts (each, an "Equal Monthly Payments-Enabled Card Account"). No interest will be charged on the promotional purchase balance (which includes the purchase amount, taxes, shipping charges and any optional debt cancellation charges related to the relevant purchase) and equal monthly payments are required in the amount of the total initial promotional purchase (including the purchase amount, taxes and shipping charges) divided by the designated number of equal monthly payments, until the promotional balance is paid in full. If you do not make a required equal monthly payment on time, a late fee may be added to the minimum amount otherwise due on your Equal Monthly Payments-Enabled Card Account in the following billing cycle; such late fees will accrue interest at the applicable standard purchase APR listed below. If products are eligible for an equal monthly payments offer, such eligibility, together with the designated number of equal monthly payments, will be noted during checkout. The equal monthly payments offer will apply to the qualifying product, and all other items in the same order, when payment is made using an Equal Monthly Payments-Enabled Card Account. Optional debt cancellation charges will not be included in the calculation of the equal monthly payment, but such charges may require you to make payments for additional months. The equal monthly payment may be higher or lower than the minimum payment that would be required if the purchase was a non-promotional purchase. The equal monthly payment calculated will not be increased to but may be included in the minimum amount otherwise due on your account or will be added to your minimum payment for other balances on your account. Equal monthly payments offers cannot be combined with any special financing offer or the % back benefit. A monthly payment, if shown in advertising, should allow you to pay off the qualifying purchase (excluding taxes, shipping charges, or optional debt cancellation charges) within the promotional period if: (1) the purchase is and will be the only balance on the account during the promotional period (this means that you do not incur any additional fees or charges on your account and no other items are purchased with this order), (2) you make the payment by the due date each month, and (3) the purchase is subject to the equal monthly payments offer. Taxes and shipping charges imposed at checkout on this order will require you to make a higher monthly payment than shown. The monthly payment calculated for each equal monthly payments offer will be added to your minimum payment for other balances on your account and will only apply if the equal monthly payments offer advertised is selected. Amazon may designate any product as eligible for an equal monthly payments offer and may designate the number of equal monthly payments associated with such equal monthly payments offer, in its sole discretion. If your purchase includes a recurring subscription, then the first month’s subscription fee (but not any subsequent monthly subscription fees) will also be included in the promotional purchase balance.
New Accounts as of 2/1/25: Variable Purchase APR 29.99%. Min Interest Charge $1.50.

Learn more about 12 equal monthly payments with 0% APR on your Prime Store Card
  • Pay equal monthly payments on Amazon.com purchases, at 0% APR, over the financing offer period*.
  • 6 equal monthly payments on purchases between $50 and $599.99
  • 12 equal monthly payments on purchases of $600 or more
  • 24 equal monthly payments on select purchases
  • *Offer subject to credit approval and can be selected at checkout on qualifying purchases. Available using all Store Card accounts and Secured Card accounts (each, an "Equal Monthly Payments-Enabled Card Account"). No interest will be charged on the promotional purchase balance (which includes the purchase amount, taxes, shipping charges and any optional debt cancellation charges related to the relevant purchase) and equal monthly payments are required in the amount of the total initial promotional purchase (including the purchase amount, taxes and shipping charges) divided by the designated number of equal monthly payments, until the promotional balance is paid in full. If you do not make a required equal monthly payment on time, a late fee may be added to the minimum amount otherwise due on your Equal Monthly Payments-Enabled Card Account in the following billing cycle; such late fees will accrue interest at the applicable standard purchase APR listed below. If products are eligible for an equal monthly payments offer, such eligibility, together with the designated number of equal monthly payments, will be noted during checkout. The equal monthly payments offer will apply to the qualifying product, and all other items in the same order, when payment is made using an Equal Monthly Payments-Enabled Card Account. Optional debt cancellation charges will not be included in the calculation of the equal monthly payment, but such charges may require you to make payments for additional months. The equal monthly payment may be higher or lower than the minimum payment that would be required if the purchase was a non-promotional purchase. The equal monthly payment calculated will not be increased to but may be included in the minimum amount otherwise due on your account or will be added to your minimum payment for other balances on your account. Equal monthly payments offers cannot be combined with any special financing offer or the % back benefit. A monthly payment, if shown in advertising, should allow you to pay off the qualifying purchase (excluding taxes, shipping charges, or optional debt cancellation charges) within the promotional period if: (1) the purchase is and will be the only balance on the account during the promotional period (this means that you do not incur any additional fees or charges on your account and no other items are purchased with this order), (2) you make the payment by the due date each month, and (3) the purchase is subject to the equal monthly payments offer. Taxes and shipping charges imposed at checkout on this order will require you to make a higher monthly payment than shown. The monthly payment calculated for each equal monthly payments offer will be added to your minimum payment for other balances on your account and will only apply if the equal monthly payments offer advertised is selected. Amazon may designate any product as eligible for an equal monthly payments offer and may designate the number of equal monthly payments associated with such equal monthly payments offer, in its sole discretion. If your purchase includes a recurring subscription, then the first month’s subscription fee (but not any subsequent monthly subscription fees) will also be included in the promotional purchase balance.

When your order ships, the entire purchase amount will be charged to your card and deducted from your available credit. Check your statement for the amount due each month.
See terms and conditions
Back
Affirm
(approval required. No late fees.)
Enter a few pieces of information for a real-time decision. This check doesn't affect your credit score.
Plans range from 3 to 48 months. Your first payment may be due today.
Make your payment at affirm.com or in the Affirm app. You'll get reminders when a payment is coming up.
Your rate will be 10-36% APR based on credit. 0% APR options may be available on specific items and/or during limited time promotions. For example, a $300 purchase could be split into 12 monthly payments of $27.79 at 20% APR. Options depend on your purchase, and a down payment may be required, which will not exceed 50% of the total purchase amount (including taxes, shipping, or any add-on charges). Payment options through Affirm are subject to an eligibility check, may not be available everywhere, and are provided by these lending partners: affirm.com/lenders. For licenses and disclosures, including information for New Mexico residents, see affirm.com/licenses. CA residents: Loans by Affirm Loan Services, LLC are made or arranged pursuant to a California Finance Lender license
Learn more
Back
Prime Store Card
(receive instant gift card on approval)
Pay equal monthly payments on Amazon.com purchases, at 0% APR, over the financing offer period*.
6 equal monthly payments on purchases between $50 and $599.99
12 equal monthly payments on purchases of $600 or more
24 equal monthly payments on select purchases
*Offer subject to credit approval and can be selected at checkout on qualifying purchases. Available using all Store Card accounts and Secured Card accounts (each, an "Equal Monthly Payments-Enabled Card Account"). No interest will be charged on the promotional purchase balance (which includes the purchase amount, taxes, shipping charges and any optional debt cancellation charges related to the relevant purchase) and equal monthly payments are required in the amount of the total initial promotional purchase (including the purchase amount, taxes and shipping charges) divided by the designated number of equal monthly payments, until the promotional balance is paid in full. If you do not make a required equal monthly payment on time, a late fee may be added to the minimum amount otherwise due on your Equal Monthly Payments-Enabled Card Account in the following billing cycle; such late fees will accrue interest at the applicable standard purchase APR listed below. If products are eligible for an equal monthly payments offer, such eligibility, together with the designated number of equal monthly payments, will be noted during checkout. The equal monthly payments offer will apply to the qualifying product, and all other items in the same order, when payment is made using an Equal Monthly Payments-Enabled Card Account. Optional debt cancellation charges will not be included in the calculation of the equal monthly payment, but such charges may require you to make payments for additional months. The equal monthly payment may be higher or lower than the minimum payment that would be required if the purchase was a non-promotional purchase. The equal monthly payment calculated will not be increased to but may be included in the minimum amount otherwise due on your account or will be added to your minimum payment for other balances on your account. Equal monthly payments offers cannot be combined with any special financing offer or the % back benefit. A monthly payment, if shown in advertising, should allow you to pay off the qualifying purchase (excluding taxes, shipping charges, or optional debt cancellation charges) within the promotional period if: (1) the purchase is and will be the only balance on the account during the promotional period (this means that you do not incur any additional fees or charges on your account and no other items are purchased with this order), (2) you make the payment by the due date each month, and (3) the purchase is subject to the equal monthly payments offer. Taxes and shipping charges imposed at checkout on this order will require you to make a higher monthly payment than shown. The monthly payment calculated for each equal monthly payments offer will be added to your minimum payment for other balances on your account and will only apply if the equal monthly payments offer advertised is selected. Amazon may designate any product as eligible for an equal monthly payments offer and may designate the number of equal monthly payments associated with such equal monthly payments offer, in its sole discretion. If your purchase includes a recurring subscription, then the first month’s subscription fee (but not any subsequent monthly subscription fees) will also be included in the promotional purchase balance.
New Accounts as of 2/1/25: Variable Purchase APR 29.99%. Min Interest Charge $1.50.

  • Pay equal monthly payments on Amazon.com purchases, at 0% APR, over the financing offer period*.
  • 6 equal monthly payments on purchases between $50 and $599.99
  • 12 equal monthly payments on purchases of $600 or more
  • 24 equal monthly payments on select purchases
  • *Offer subject to credit approval and can be selected at checkout on qualifying purchases. Available using all Store Card accounts and Secured Card accounts (each, an "Equal Monthly Payments-Enabled Card Account"). No interest will be charged on the promotional purchase balance (which includes the purchase amount, taxes, shipping charges and any optional debt cancellation charges related to the relevant purchase) and equal monthly payments are required in the amount of the total initial promotional purchase (including the purchase amount, taxes and shipping charges) divided by the designated number of equal monthly payments, until the promotional balance is paid in full. If you do not make a required equal monthly payment on time, a late fee may be added to the minimum amount otherwise due on your Equal Monthly Payments-Enabled Card Account in the following billing cycle; such late fees will accrue interest at the applicable standard purchase APR listed below. If products are eligible for an equal monthly payments offer, such eligibility, together with the designated number of equal monthly payments, will be noted during checkout. The equal monthly payments offer will apply to the qualifying product, and all other items in the same order, when payment is made using an Equal Monthly Payments-Enabled Card Account. Optional debt cancellation charges will not be included in the calculation of the equal monthly payment, but such charges may require you to make payments for additional months. The equal monthly payment may be higher or lower than the minimum payment that would be required if the purchase was a non-promotional purchase. The equal monthly payment calculated will not be increased to but may be included in the minimum amount otherwise due on your account or will be added to your minimum payment for other balances on your account. Equal monthly payments offers cannot be combined with any special financing offer or the % back benefit. A monthly payment, if shown in advertising, should allow you to pay off the qualifying purchase (excluding taxes, shipping charges, or optional debt cancellation charges) within the promotional period if: (1) the purchase is and will be the only balance on the account during the promotional period (this means that you do not incur any additional fees or charges on your account and no other items are purchased with this order), (2) you make the payment by the due date each month, and (3) the purchase is subject to the equal monthly payments offer. Taxes and shipping charges imposed at checkout on this order will require you to make a higher monthly payment than shown. The monthly payment calculated for each equal monthly payments offer will be added to your minimum payment for other balances on your account and will only apply if the equal monthly payments offer advertised is selected. Amazon may designate any product as eligible for an equal monthly payments offer and may designate the number of equal monthly payments associated with such equal monthly payments offer, in its sole discretion. If your purchase includes a recurring subscription, then the first month’s subscription fee (but not any subsequent monthly subscription fees) will also be included in the promotional purchase balance.

AppleCare+
Accidents happen, AppleCare+ covers them.

    Protect your purchase

    AppleCare+ for iPad - 2 Years
    4835
    $169.00
    • DROPPED, CRACKED, FIXED—Get easy, fast repairs for accidents like drops and spills as often as you need.
    • 24/7 PRIORITY SUPPORT—Connect with an Apple expert any time to get help with the products you love.
    • BATTERY REPLACEMENTS—If your battery holds less than 80% capacity, get a new battery at no extra charge.
    • EXPRESS REPLACEMENT SERVICE—We’ll ship you a replacement before you send your original device in.
    • REPLACEMENTS FOR ACCESSORIES—Damaged iPad accessories like Apple Pencil or an Apple-branded keyboard can be replaced for a small fee.
    • GLOBAL REPAIR ACCESS—Help is never far away. Visit an Apple Store or one of our 5000+ Apple Authorized Service Providers worldwide.
    • EXTENDED COVERAGE, BUILT IN—Get extended warranty coverage for any hardware issues.

Brand Apple
Model Name iPad Pro
Memory Storage Capacity 256 GB
Screen Size 13 Inches
Display Resolution Maximum 2752-by-2064-pixel resolution at 264 ppi

About this item

  • WHY IPAD PRO — iPad Pro with the Apple M5 chip delivers extraordinary performance for effortless productivity on a stunning display. Take on pro workflows with Neural Accelerators for AI and a redesigned iPadOS with game-changing capabilities.*
  • PERFORMANCE AND STORAGE — iPad Pro with M5 brings next-generation speed and the power of on-device AI to all your tasks.* Featuring up to 2TB of storage, 16GB of memory, and Neural Accelerators for next-level AI performance.*
  • IPADOS — Run pro apps and get more done with iPadOS 26 with Liquid Glass design and game-changing capabilities.* With an intuitive and flexible windowing system, you can control, organize, and manage your workflows like never before.
  • APPLE INTELLIGENCE — Apple Intelligence is the personal intelligence system that helps you communicate, express yourself, and get things done effortlessly with groundbreaking privacy protections at every step.*
  • 13-INCH ULTRA RETINA XDR DISPLAY — The world’s most advanced display, featuring extreme brightness, precise contrast, ProMotion, P3 wide color, and True Tone.* Nano-texture display glass available in 1TB and 2TB configurations
  • APPLE PENCIL AND MAGIC KEYBOARD FOR IPAD PRO — Apple Pencil Pro and Apple Pencil (USB-C) enable intuitive and precise control for drawing, note-taking, and creativity. Magic Keyboard provides comfortable typing and a trackpad with haptic feedback.*
  • ADVANCED CAMERAS — iPad Pro features a landscape 12MP Center Stage camera and a 12MP Wide camera with adaptive True Tone flash. Four studio-quality microphones and a four-speaker audio system provide rich audio.
  • CONNECTIVITY — Wi-Fi 7 with Apple N1 gives you fast wireless connections.* Work from almost anywhere with quick transfers of photos, documents, and large video files.
  • UNLOCK AND PAY WITH FACE ID — Unlock your iPad Pro, securely authenticate purchases, sign in to apps, and more — all with just a glance.*
  • * LEGAL DISCLAIMERS — This is a summary of the main product features. See below to learn more.
Show more

Sustainability features

This product has sustainability features recognized by trusted certifications.
Energy efficiency
Conserves energy compared to similar products.
As certified by
EPEAT

EPEAT

EPEAT certifies electronic products based on sustainability impacts across their life cycle including requirements for energy efficiency and end-of-life management. An EPEAT registered product can also meet optional more ambitious criteria including reduction of fluorinated greenhouse gases (F-GHGs). Products meeting 50% - 74% optional criteria are 'Silver' and those meeting 75% or more are 'Gold'.

Learn more about this certification

Certification Level

GOLD

Technical Details

Apple iPad Pro 13-inch (M5)

Display

  • Ultra Retina XDR display
  • Tandem OLED3
  • 2752-by-2064-pixel resolution at 264 ppi
  • ProMotion technology with adaptive refresh rates from 10Hz to 120Hz
  • Wide color (P3)
  • True Tone
  • Fingerprint-resistant oleophobic coating
  • Fully laminated
  • Antireflective coating
  • Nano-texture display glass option on 1TB and 2TB models
  • SDR brightness: 1000 nits max
  • XDR brightness: 1000 nits max full screen, 1600 nits peak (HDR content only)
  • 1 nit minimum brightness
  • 2,000,000:1 contrast ratio
  • Supports Apple Pencil Pro
  • Supports Apple Pencil (USB‑C)
  • Apple Pencil hover

    		•

    Chip

  • Apple M5 chip
  • Models with 256GB or 512GB storage:
  • 9-core CPU with 3 performance cores and 6 efficiency cores
  • 10-core GPU
  • Neural Accelerators
  • Hardware-accelerated ray tracing
  • 16-core Neural Engine
  • 153GB/s memory bandwidth
  • 12GB RAM
  • Models with 1TB or 2TB storage:
  • 10-core CPU with 4 performance cores and 6 efficiency cores
  • 10-core GPU
  • Neural Accelerators
  • Hardware-accelerated ray tracing
  • 16-core Neural Engine
  • 153GB/s memory bandwidth
  • 16GB RAM
  • Media Engine
  • Hardware-accelerated 8K H.264, HEVC, ProRes, and ProRes RAW
  • Video decode engine
  • Video encode engine
  • ProRes encode and decode engine
  • AV1 decode

    		•

    Apple Intelligence

  • Built into your iPad, Apple Intelligence is the personal intelligence system that helps you write, express yourself, and get things done effortlessly. With groundbreaking privacy protections, it gives you peace of mind that no one else can access your data — not even Apple.

    		•

    Camera

  • 12MP Wide camera, ƒ/1.8 aperture
  • Digital zoom up to 5x
  • Five‑element lens
  • Adaptive True Tone flash
  • Panorama (up to 63MP)
  • Sapphire crystal lens cover
  • Autofocus with Focus Pixels
  • Smart HDR 4
  • Wide color capture for photos and Live Photos
  • Advanced red-eye correction
  • Photo geotagging
  • Auto image stabilization
  • Burst mode
  • Image formats captured: HEIF and JPEG

    		•

    Video Recording

  • 4K video recording at 24 fps, 25 fps, 30 fps, or 60 fps
  • 1080p HD video recording at 25 fps, 30 fps, or 60 fps
  • 720p HD video recording at 30 fps
  • ProRes video recording up to 4K at 30 fps (1080p at 30 fps for 256GB storage)
  • Audio zoom
  • Adaptive True Tone flash
  • Slo‑mo video support for 1080p at 120 fps or 240 fps
  • Time‑lapse video with stabilization
  • Extended dynamic range for video up to 30 fps
  • Cinematic video stabilization (4K, 1080p, and 720p)
  • Continuous autofocus video
  • Playback zoom
  • Video formats recorded: HEVC and H.264
  • Stereo recording

    		•

    TrueDepth Camera

  • Landscape 12MP Center Stage camera
  • ƒ/2.0 aperture
  • Portrait mode with advanced bokeh and Depth Control
  • Portrait Lighting with six effects (Natural, Studio, Contour, Stage, Stage Mono, High‑Key Mono)
  • Animoji and Memoji
  • Smart HDR 4
  • 1080p HD video recording at 25 fps, 30 fps, or 60 fps
  • Time‑lapse video with stabilization
  • Extended dynamic range for video up to 30 fps
  • Cinematic video stabilization (1080p and 720p)
  • Wide color capture for photos and Live Photos
  • Lens correction
  • Retina Flash with True Tone
  • Auto image stabilization
  • Burst mode

    		•

    Video Calling

  • FaceTime video
  • Center Stage
  • iPad to any FaceTime-enabled device over Wi-Fi or cellular
  • Share experiences like movies, TV, music, and other apps in a FaceTime call with SharePlay
  • Screen sharing
  • Portrait mode in FaceTime video
  • Spatial Audio
  • Voice Isolation and Wide Spectrum microphone modes
  • Local capture

    		•

    Audio Calling

  • FaceTime audio
  • Relay cellular calls from your nearby iPhone with the Phone app

    		•

    Speakers

  • Four speaker audio

    		•

    Microphones

  • Studio-quality four-mic array for calls, video recording, and audio recording

    		•

    Cellular and Wireless

  • All models
  • Apple N1 wireless networking chip
  • Wi‑Fi 7 (802.11be) with 2x2 MIMO6
  • Simultaneous dual band
  • Bluetooth 6
  • Thread networking technology
  • Wi-Fi + Cellular models
  • Apple C1X cellular modem
  • 5G (sub‑6 GHz) with 4x4 MIMO
  • Gigabit LTE with 4x4 MIMO

    		•

    Location

  • All models
  • Digital compassWi-Fi
  • iBeacon microlocation
  • Wi-Fi + Cellular models
  • GPS/GNSS
  • Cellular

    		•

    Sensors

  • Face ID
  • LiDAR Scanner
  • Three-axis gyro
  • Accelerometer
  • Barometer
  • Ambient light sensors

    		•

    Face ID

  • Enabled by TrueDepth camera for facial recognition
  • Unlock iPad
  • Secure personal data within apps
  • Make purchases from the iTunes Store, App Store, and Apple Books

    		•

    Apple Pay

  • Pay with your iPad using Face ID within apps and on the web
  • Send and receive money in Messages

    		•

    Siri

  • Get help with everyday tasks like sending messages, setting reminders, and more
  • Activate hands-free with only your voice using “Siri” or “Hey Siri,” or use Type to Siri
  • Protected by the strongest privacy of any intelligent assistant
  • Powered by Apple Intelligence, Siri is more natural and helpful

    		•

    Charging and Expansion

  • Thunderbolt / USB 4 port with support for:
  • Charging
  • DisplayPort
  • Thunderbolt 3 (up to 40Gb/s)
  • USB 4 (up to 40Gb/s)
  • USB 3 (up to 10Gb/s)

    		•

    Display Support

  • Supports full native resolution on the built-in display at millions of colors
  • Supports one external display with up to 6K resolution at 60Hz or up to 4k resolution at 120Hz
  • Thunderbolt 3 digital video output
  • Native DisplayPort output over USB-C
  • VGA, HDMI, DVI, and Thunderbolt 2 output supported using adapters (sold separately)11
  • Video mirroring
  • Up to 4K AirPlay for mirroring, photos, and video out to Apple TV (2nd generation or later) or AirPlay‑enabled smart TV
  • Video mirroring and video out support through USB-C Digital AV Multiport Adapter and USB-C VGA Multiport Adapter (adapters sold separately

    		•

    Power and Battery

  • Built-in 31.29-watt-hour rechargeable lithium-polymer battery
  • Up to 10 hours of surfing the web on Wi-Fi or watching video
  • Charging via power adapter or USB-C to computer system
  • Fast-charge capable: Up to 50% charge in around 30 minutes with the 40W Dynamic Power Adapter with 60W Max or other USB‑C power adapter capable of providing 60W or higher (adapters sold separately)
  • Wi-Fi + Cellular models
  • Up to 9 hours of surfing the web using cellular data network

    		•

    Product information

    Technical Details

    Product Dimensions ‎8.48 x 11.09 x 0.2 inches
    Item Weight ‎1.28 pounds
    Manufacturer ‎Apple
    ASIN ‎B0FWD1MS82
    Item model number ‎MDYJ4LL/A
    Batteries ‎1 Lithium Ion batteries required. (included)
    Date First Available ‎October 14, 2025

  • USB-C Charge Cable
  • 20W USB-C Power Adapter

    How customer reviews and ratings work

    Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

    To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

    Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

    Customers say

    Customers praise the iPad Pro's build quality, with one noting it's an amazing video editing device, and they appreciate its functionality, with one mentioning it handles various tasks well. The display receives positive feedback for its fantastic resolution, and customers find it incredibly fast. While some customers consider it worth the price, others find it pricey.

    Amazon Customer
    5 out of 5 stars
    iPad Pro 13 M5 Perfecto para mi
    Excelente vendedor aproveche la oferta del Black Friday, estoy encantado con este iPad Pro de 13 pulgadas. Vengo de un iPad de séptima generación 2019 es mi primer iPad Pro de 13 y estoy asombrado de la calidad de imagen. La pantalla es fabulosa súper delgado si eres como yo que le gustan las pantallas grandes, no dudes en comprarlo, lo estoy usando como tableta no he comprado el Keyboard ya que es muy caro pero quizá después me lo compre tengo el Apple Pencil primer generación, lastimosamente este Apple Pencil no es compatible con esta iPad, así que si tienes un Apple Pencil de primera generación o segunda generación. Temo que no vas a poder vincularlo con esta iPad y tendrías que comprarte un USB tipo C o un Apple Pencil Pro para una mejor compatibilidad. De ahí todo está excelente encantado con la compra de Navidad que hice😍
    MoreHide
    Thank you for your feedback
    Sorry, there was an error

    Top reviews from the United States

    There was a problem filtering reviews. Please reload the page.

    • Colinstump
      5.0 out of 5 stars Pricey but amazing
      Reviewed in the United States on January 4, 2026
      Style: Wi-FiSize: 2TBColor: Space BlackSet name: Nano-Texture GlassConfiguration: Without Apple PencilVerified Purchase
      It’s definitely pricey but if you are looking to do anything on a professional level or if you are an artist looking to expand your abilities then this tablet is definitely for you!! It is an amazing video editing device too. It’s lightweight and the size of the bigger screen lets you really take in the sharpness of the screen itself. I watched some of “the Vinland saga” on both my tv and my iPad and the colors blew me away on the iPad. It’s also super smooth in terms of frames. I can’t really explain how amazing and satisfying it is on the eye while using this device. If you have the money to spend I highly recommend this product. It does both modern and retro gaming with ease, handles video editing and drawing like a pro (especially with the smart pen you can get) and overall it was a smooth experience and the setup is as simple as any other modern day Apple product.
      Read more

             Report
    • EMH
      5.0 out of 5 stars Stunning
      Reviewed in the United States on January 27, 2026
      Style: Wi-FiSize: 256GBColor: Space BlackSet name: Standard GlassConfiguration: Without Apple PencilVerified Purchase
      I replaced a 2024 M2 iPad Air 11" which is already an impressive device.

      Did I need to upgrade? Nope. Did I have $1300 (I bought the Smart Folio case from Apple to go with it) laying around...not really (love the Prime card 12 months 0% financing). Do I regret my impulse purchase? I REGRET NOTHING.

      The dimensions are stunning, especially sans case. This has, almost exactly, the same length and width as the standard 8.5" x 11" piece of paper we're all familiar with. And it's about as thick as 50 of those pieces of paper. Think about that. It's a computer and a 13" screen in a form factor the size of a notebook that weighs about as much as a half liter plastic bottle of water.

      This is simply an insane piece of technology. I am 53 this year. If you had shown this to me when I was a child, I would have thought this was an alien artifact smuggled out of Area 51. It is that impressive.

      The screen is the star of the show. It's just...breathtaking is a stupid thing to say about something like this but it absolutely applies. The contrast, resolution, colors and 'pro motion' (120Hz refresh rate) make it the nicest screen in my house. Yes you can get a TV that looks as good as this, but I don't have one even though I love my Q70 Samsung.

      The audio that comes out of something this flat is pretty wild too. My primary work station is a 15" M3 MacBook Air. These speakers are better than that (so is the screen, not close. And yes I know I'm comparing an Air laptop with a Pro iPad but that's my frame of reference.

      Holding this in one hand, unsupported, will induce some fatigue relatively quickly. If you're using two hands, you can tote this thing all day but it becomes somewhat difficult to utilize the touchscreen effectively that way, in my experience.

      In terms of performance, I don't do anything on it that taxes it but it feels snappier than the iPad Air it replaced but this could just be the Pro Motion experience. There is a lot of horsepower here and whatever you do on a tablet this thing will laugh at.

      I would love to have had the money to splurge for the 1TB model with the 16G of RAM (12 in the 256/512 models) and the nanotexture glass (what is this? No idea but I'd like it, I think). For me 256G local storage is more than fine and the $650 difference from here to 1TB, even with the extra features, could in no way be justified on what was already a luxury purchase.

      Battery life is fantastic. It's better than my 11" Air which was already fine. Again my primary 'work' station is a MacBook Air so I'm not on this thing 9 hours a day but I could use it 2-3 days without a charge. The charger I use is the 35w dual USB-C that came with the 15" MacBook Air and it is lightning fast...getting this back to 80% from 50% in less than an hour.
      Read more
      51 people found this helpful
      Helpful

    • J. Smith
      5.0 out of 5 stars Nice device, if a bit expensive
      Reviewed in the United States on February 24, 2026
      Style: Wi-FiSize: 256GBColor: Space BlackSet name: Standard GlassConfiguration: Without Apple PencilVerified Purchase
      I’m normally a PC guy, but decided I want to do something a bit different for my portable machine, especially after hearing about IOS 26 and how it ‘almost’ works like a desktop.

      There are still lots of IOS-isms when using it, but for the most part, it’s a capable little machine! I have it connected to a USB hub with HDMI out and pass-through power and it’s working great (a cheap adapter from Wally World). The sound is great, the screen is extremely nice quality, and I love writing on it with the pen. Highly recommended if you want to have a touch device, but also a capable quasi-laptop (when using the Magic Keyboard).
      Read more
      21 people found this helpful

    • Happy Customer
      5.0 out of 5 stars Amazing in all aspects!
      Reviewed in the United States on November 2, 2025
      Style: Wi-FiSize: 512GBColor: SilverSet name: Standard GlassConfiguration: Without Apple PencilVerified Purchase
      I love this iPad and waited a long time for it. I wish there was a book on how to use it with all its secrets and shortcuts. Definitely go and get it!!! It is huge (13”). I love it. It is considerably lightweight considering the size. I have really bad internet service but this iPad is fast and working better than I thought. The screen is so sharp and new. I want to get a screen protector to keep it shiny and clear. Considering the price is pretty normal. I have only charged it once and it charged to 100% very quickly. All in all I recommend this amazing iPad with the new. M5 chip.

    • Jason G
      5.0 out of 5 stars The world’s most advanced tablet
      Reviewed in the United States on February 16, 2026
      Style: Wi-FiSize: 256GBColor: Space BlackSet name: Standard GlassConfiguration: Without Apple PencilVerified Purchase
      This iPad is the best iPad I’ve ever had, obviously. Coming from an iPad Air 4, which was great at the time, the iPad Pro M5 is so smooth and snappy. It works very well for all of my YouTube watching….lol. I’ve been using it for video editing and CAD design, and it has been great. One thing I love about it is how much it feels like a laptop at times. I purchased an ESR keyboard that is very similar to the Magic Keyboard, as well as an Apple Pencil Pro, and it is a powerful workstation. It’s a bit expensive, but still $100 or so less that purchasing from Apple, and being able to use the 12-month interest-free payments with my Amazon card was very convenient.

    • JG
      5.0 out of 5 stars Mostly AWESOME … although more of a gas-hog than it was advertised as
      Reviewed in the United States on February 23, 2026
      Style: Wi-FiSize: 1TBColor: Space BlackSet name: Standard GlassConfiguration: Without Apple PencilVerified Purchase
      Awesome unit - great upgrade form my 10” the screen space is beneficial - but so too is the horse power this puppy has - I haven’t put it fully thought its paces - but day to day work is great.

      A bit of a gas hog .. as it needs charging as much or more than its smaller brother - which is ehh - but other than that I haven’t fond much fault with this unit.
